author: smuzaffar
body: This is a workaround to fix the FWLITE builds (see https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50210 issue for details). This reverts the `Trajectory` change for `DataFormats/EgammaTrackReco` done in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50161.
title: [FWLite] Avoid dependnecy on TrackingTools/PatternTools
